title: Through Tiki's Eyes
description: Unique 16x16 style that can be used for builds and practicality!
body:
# Discord: Visit my discord server for work in progress textures, and give feedback! Changelogs are posted in there for all previous updates + upcoming updates that are actively in progress (spoliers!)
--- This pack is my passion project and is work in progress, so it will be updated! The updates are not scheduled, it's all up to how my life will turn around. This page on Modrinth is the official page where you can get the resourcepack. The pack's goal is to have a rich environment feel, while keeping close to vanilla. I tried to make the blocks still work in vanilla building as best as possible. All textures done by me, but I am open for suggestions. Please enjoy! # Changes: - Retextured + custom blocks - Retextured + custom items - Retextured + custom entities - Retextured + custom environment - Retextured + custom gui - Custom fog # Dependencies: **Sodium**: fixes lighting bug with custom models while also providing better fps (if there are too many custom model textures)\ **Continuity** or **Optifine**: connected and glowing textures\ **OptiGUI** or **Optifine**: custom gui for some stations and inventories\ **EMF** or **Optifine**: Entity Model Features/ custom entity models\ **ETF** or **Optifine**: Entity Texture Features/ entity variations and glowing textures\ **Polytone**: Custom fog and block modifiers # Q&A: Q: Can I use your textures for my project?\ A: No, you cannot use Through Tiki's Eyes resource pack's textures for your own public projects.\ Q: Is there a version of the resource pack for Bedrock Edition?\ A: As of right now, no.\ Q: Can I use your resource pack in my videos?\ A: Yes, as long as you add the link to this page specifically, don't just post the file itself.\ Q: Is Through Tiki's Eyes compatible with mods?\ A: Yes, depends on how mod intense your modpack is.\ Q: Is Through Tiki's Eyes compatible with servers that use their own resource pack?\ A: Yes, if you are planning to use server pack unlocker, beware of glitched textures.\ Q: Can I repost this pack on other websites?\ A: No! this would be copyright infringement and would make me very sad. Please don't do it. # Latest Release:
